description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a sleek, minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of white and dark gray walls, large glass windows, and a prominent driveway leading to a garage. The property is surrounded by a black fence and includes a landscaped yard with several large trees, a swimming pool, and a small garden area. The front of the house has a red car parked on the driveway, and the backyard is equipped with outdoor seating and recreational space. The windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces, and the overall layout emphasizes open-plan living with direct access to outdoor amenities.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, garage, and landscaped yard featuring trees and a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, red car, main entrance, and partial view of the backyard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, garden, and three large trees obscuring parts of the house.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the open-plan interior, outdoor seating area, and the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the garage, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a modern door, direct driveway access, no porch, and minimal overhang.
